---
pagetitle: "Team — OpenPipeline"
title: "Team"
description: "The people building and maintaining OpenPipeline."
toc: false
page-layout: full
anchor-sections: false
css: team.css
---

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_team.py — do not hand-edit.
     Code contributors come from each package repo's src/authors/;
     maintainers, advisors and sponsors come from data/members/.
     See design/team-authorship.md. -->

## Package maintainers

```{=html}
<div class="people-widget justify-content-evenly">
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/DriesSchaumont.png" alt="Dries Schaumont" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Dries Schaumont</h4>
      <h6 class="team-role"><i>Package Manager &amp; Maintainer</i></h6>
      <h6><i>Bioinformatics Engineer at <a href="https://www.data-intuitive.com">Data Intuitive</a></i></h6>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="mailto:dries@data-intuitive.com" title="E-mail"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/DriesSchaumont" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4389-0440" title="ORCID"><span class="link-text">ORCID</span></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/dries-schaumont" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/dorien-er.png" alt="Dorien Roosen" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Dorien Roosen</h4>
      <h6 class="team-role"><i>Package Maintainer</i></h6>
      <h6><i>Bioinformatics Engineer at <a href="https://www.data-intuitive.com">Data Intuitive</a></i></h6>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="mailto:dorien@data-intuitive.com" title="E-mail"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/dorien-er" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-6261-8151" title="ORCID"><span class="link-text">ORCID</span></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/dorien-roosen" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/jakubmajercik.png" alt="Jakub Majercik" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Jakub Majercik</h4>
      <h6 class="team-role"><i>Package Maintainer</i></h6>
      <h6><i>Bioinformatics Engineer at <a href="https://www.data-intuitive.com">Data Intuitive</a></i></h6>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="mailto:jakub@data-intuitive.com" title="E-mail"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/jakubmajercik" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jakubmajercik" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Code contributors

```{=html}
<div class="people-widget justify-content-evenly">
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/aopisco.png" alt="Angela Oliveira Pisco" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Angela Oliveira Pisco</h4>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/aopisco" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-0142-2355" title="ORCID"><span class="link-text">ORCID</span></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/aopisco" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/dorien-er.png" alt="Dorien Roosen" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Dorien Roosen</h4>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/dorien-er" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/dorien-roosen" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/ddemaeyer.png" alt="Dries De Maeyer" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Dries De Maeyer</h4>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/ddemaeyer" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/dries-de-maeyer-b46a814" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/DriesSchaumont.png" alt="Dries Schaumont" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Dries Schaumont</h4>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/DriesSchaumont" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4389-0440" title="ORCID"><span class="link-text">ORCID</span></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/dries-schaumont" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="/images/avatar.svg" alt="Elizabeth Mlynarski" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Elizabeth Mlynarski</h4>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/Isabelle-b.png" alt="Isabelle Bergiers" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Isabelle Bergiers</h4>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/Isabelle-b" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9622-7960" title="ORCID"><span class="link-text">ORCID</span></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/jakubmajercik.png" alt="Jakub Majercik" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Jakub Majercik</h4>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/jakubmajercik" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jakubmajercik" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/KaiWaldrant.png" alt="Kai Waldrant" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Kai Waldrant</h4>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/KaiWaldrant" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://orcid.org/0009-0003-8555-1361" title="ORCID"><span class="link-text">ORCID</span></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/kaiwaldrant" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/lazappi.png" alt="Luke Zappia" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Luke Zappia</h4>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/lazappi" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0001-7744-8565" title="ORCID"><span class="link-text">ORCID</span></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/lazappi" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/LuckyMD.png" alt="Malte D. Luecken" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Malte D. Luecken</h4>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/LuckyMD" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0001-7464-7921" title="ORCID"><span class="link-text">ORCID</span></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/malte-l%C3%BCcken-b8b21049" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/mvanmoerbeke.png" alt="Marijke Van Moerbeke" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Marijke Van Moerbeke</h4>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/mvanmoerbeke" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3097-5621" title="ORCID"><span class="link-text">ORCID</span></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/marijke-van-moerbeke-84303a34" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/MatthiasBeyens.png" alt="Matthias Beyens" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Matthias Beyens</h4>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/MatthiasBeyens" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3304-0706" title="ORCID"><span class="link-text">ORCID</span></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/mbeyens" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/mauro-saporita.png" alt="Mauro Saporita" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Mauro Saporita</h4>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/mauro-saporita" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/mauro-saporita-930b06a5" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/PoGibas.png" alt="Povilas Gibas" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Povilas Gibas</h4>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/PoGibas" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/povilas-gibas" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/rcannood.png" alt="Robrecht Cannoodt" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Robrecht Cannoodt</h4>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/rcannood" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3641-729X" title="ORCID"><span class="link-text">ORCID</span></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/robrechtcannoodt" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/srdsam.png" alt="Samuel D&#x27;Souza" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Samuel D&#x27;Souza</h4>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/srdsam" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/samuel-d-souza-887023150/" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/SarahOuologuem.png" alt="Sarah Ouologuem" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Sarah Ouologuem</h4>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/SarahOuologuem" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://orcid.org/0009-0005-3398-1700" title="ORCID"><span class="link-text">ORCID</span></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/tverbeiren.png" alt="Toni Verbeiren" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Toni Verbeiren</h4>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/tverbeiren" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/verbeiren" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/vladimirshitov.png" alt="Vladimir Shitov" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Vladimir Shitov</h4>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/vladimirshitov" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1960-8812" title="ORCID"><span class="link-text">ORCID</span></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/vladimir-shitov-9a659513b" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="/images/avatar.svg" alt="Weiwei Schultz" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Weiwei Schultz</h4>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/wxicu.png" alt="Xichen Wu" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Xichen Wu</h4>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/wxicu" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://orcid.org/0009-0008-2168-4508" title="ORCID"><span class="link-text">ORCID</span></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/xichen-wu" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Scientific advisors

```{=html}
<div class="people-widget justify-content-evenly">
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/ddemaeyer.png" alt="Dries De Maeyer" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Dries De Maeyer</h4>
      <h6><i>Senior Principle Scientist at <a href="https://www.jnj.com/">Johnson &amp; Johnson</a></i></h6>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/ddemaeyer" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1314-3348" title="ORCID"><span class="link-text">ORCID</span></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/dries-de-maeyer-b46a814" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/LuckyMD.png" alt="Malte D. Luecken" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Malte D. Luecken</h4>
      <h6><i>Group Leader at <a href="https://www.helmholtz-munich.de">Helmholtz Munich</a></i></h6>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/LuckyMD" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0001-7464-7921" title="ORCID"><span class="link-text">ORCID</span></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/malte-l%C3%BCcken-b8b21049" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="/images/avatar.svg" alt="Weiwei Schultz" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Weiwei Schultz</h4>
      <h6><i>Distinguished Scientist at <a href="https://www.jnj.com/">Johnson &amp; Johnson</a></i></h6>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/weiwei-schultz" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Project sponsors

```{=html}
<div class="people-widget justify-content-evenly">
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/ddemaeyer.png" alt="Dries De Maeyer" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Dries De Maeyer</h4>
      <h6><i>Senior Principle Scientist at <a href="https://www.jnj.com/">Johnson &amp; Johnson</a></i></h6>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/ddemaeyer" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1314-3348" title="ORCID"><span class="link-text">ORCID</span></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/dries-de-maeyer-b46a814" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="/images/avatar.svg" alt="Joke Reumers" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Joke Reumers</h4>
      <h6><i>Director Portfolio Management at <a href="https://www.jnj.com/">Johnson &amp; Johnson</a></i></h6>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0001-5434-6515" title="ORCID"><span class="link-text">ORCID</span></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jokereumers" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="https://github.com/tverbeiren.png" alt="Toni Verbeiren" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Toni Verbeiren</h4>
      <h6><i>Founder and CEO at <a href="https://www.data-intuitive.com">Data Intuitive</a></i></h6>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://github.com/tverbeiren" title="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-7007-6866" title="ORCID"><span class="link-text">ORCID</span></a>
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/verbeiren" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="people-person">
    <img loading="lazy" class="avatar avatar-circle" src="/images/avatar.svg" alt="Weiwei Schultz" />
    <div class="portrait-title">
      <h4>Weiwei Schultz</h4>
      <h6><i>Distinguished Scientist at <a href="https://www.jnj.com/">Johnson &amp; Johnson</a></i></h6>
      <div class="network">
        <a class="network-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/weiwei-schultz" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
